description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named linux that runs on push to the master branch, on pull requests, and on a scheduled cron job. Use an ubuntu-latest job with a matrix strategy to test multiple Python versions (3.6, 3.7) in parallel. Configure the environment with specific variables, check out the repository with submodules, set up caching, install Miniconda, configure a Conda environment, build and install Reaktoro with ccache, and run tests with pytest.
